heading: Create a Vertex AI Extension
body:
In this section, you create a Vertex AI Extension that enables natural language querying
on your data in Atlas by using the Gemini 1.5 Pro model. This extension uses
an OpenAPI specification and the Cloud Run function you created to map
natural language to database operations and query your data in Atlas.

To implement this extension, you use an interactive Python notebook, which allows
you to run Python code snippets individually. For this tutorial, you create a
notebook named `mongodb-vertex-ai-extension.ipynb` in an [Colab Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/colab/docs/introduction) environment.
